[[Lord/Legends|Lord]] '''Allic''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] criminal who ran a [[Casino/Legends|casino]] and [[Hotel/Legends|hotel]] on the tourist world of [[Nezmi]]. A member of [[Black Nebula (organization)|Black Nebula]], he passed a percentage of the earnings onto [[Dequc]]. Allic had three irises in each [[Eye/Legends|eye]], and four legs to carry his bulbous body.

{{Char-stub}}
